title: AI Intent
description: AI v1 intent contract for classifying customer/channel requests before response instruction, guard, recommendation, or handoff.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05 and TECH-05 AI Advisor. AI may interpret and recommend but is not source of truth for price, stock, order, payment, claims, or private data. TODO: source documents do not lock a complete intent taxonomy.

intent_type.description: Detected intent type. TODO: define official intent enum from source docs.

requires_handoff.description: Whether AI must hand off to human or Commerce Runtime.

public_private_context.description: Public/private context used before response. Prefer enums/channel/visibility-state.yaml when available.
